title: cyperus niger subsp. elegantulus
intro: Cyperus niger subsp. elegantulus, also known as the purple papyrus or Cyperus elegantulus, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyperus niger subsp. elegantulus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
